SET 17 IS HERE.

Woo, worship, and weaponize in TFT: Space Gods. Space Gods summons tacticians to the final frontier packed with almighty celestial beings looking to bestow their infinite cosmic power upon worthy champions.

GODS

The Realm of the Gods is a celestial marketplace that showcases the Gods’ offerings to players - replacing TFT’s traditional carousel this set.
At the beginning of every game, 2 gods are randomly selected and travel to the Realm of the Gods to tempt the player and provide rewards.
In the middle of each stage, players will travel back to the realm, where they will be able to select between an offering presented by each of the two gods. Align with a specific god by choosing their offerings from the Realm at least two times on stages 2, 3 and 4. On stage 4-7, your favored God with bless you with a special boon unique only to them!

Ahri

God of Opulence

Stage 2
6 gold8 XP5 Rerolls6 gold, maybe +1
Stage 3
8 gold7 Rerolls10 XP8 gold, maybe +2
Stage 4
12 gold8 Rerolls12 gold, maybe +3
Stage 4‑7 Perk

Gain 2 gold, 2 XP, and 2 rerolls each round

NEW CHAMPIONS.

Aatrox
1
Stellar Slash

Heal, then deal (AD & Armor) Physical Damage to the current target. N.O.V.A. Strike: Cleave the battlefield, briefly knocking up all enemies and dealing physical damage.

Briar
1
Fish Frenzy

Passive: For every % of missing Health, gain (AP) Attack Speed. Active: Deal (AD) Physical Damage to the target, increased if they're a Tank.

Caitlyn
1
Aim For The Head

Passive: Attacks have a % chance to fire an empowered Headshot, dealing (AD & AP) physical damage. N.O.V.A. Strike: Mark all enemies, increasing damage taken. The first time marked targets drop below % Health, Headshot them for physical damage.

Cho'Gath
1
Feast

Deal (Health & AP) Magic Damage to the lowest Health enemy in range and permanently gain max Health. If this kills them, devour them and permanently gain additional max Health instead.

Ezreal
1
Temporal Shot

Fire a blast at the current target dealing (AD) physical damage. Every few takedowns, gain a drone that deals additional Physical Damage to the current target on cast.

Leona
1
Shield of Daybreak

Gain (AP) Shield for 4 seconds. Bash the current target dealing (Armor & MR) Magic Damage and stunning them.

Lissandra
1
Dark Matter

Hurl a dagger towards the current target dealing (AP) Magic Damage to the first target hit. At its final destination, the dagger explodes dealing (AP) Magic Damage to nearby targets.

Nasus
1
Groovin' Susan

Transform temporarily gaining max Health and dealing (Health & AP) Magic Damage to adjacent enemies each second. While transformed, Nasus is in The Groove.

Poppy
1
Huddle Up!

Gain (AP) Shield. For the duration, allies within two hexes gain (AP) Armor and Magic Resistance. Meep Bonus: Meeps grant Shield to the nearest allies.

Rek'Sai
1
Upheaval

Heal (Health & AP), then briefly knock up adjacent enemies and deal (AP) magic damage.

Talon
1
Diviner's Judgment

Stab the target causing them to bleed for (AD & AP) Physical Damage over time. After the attack, leap to the highest percent Health enemy within range.

Teemo
1
Double Time

Passive: Attacks deal (AP) bonus Magic Damage and stacking Magic Damage over time. While an enemy has enough stacks, Teemo is in The Groove. Active: Gain Attack Speed for several attacks.

Twisted Fate
1
Fate's Gambit

Draw a card with a value between 1 and 9, then throw it at the target. Deal scaled (AP) Magic Damage based on the card drawn. Overkill damage bounces to the nearest enemy.

Veigar
1
Meepteor Shower

Call down a Meepteor on the target dealing (AP) magic damage. Meep Bonus: Additional mini Meepteors are called down on nearby targets dealing Magic Damage each.

Akali
2
Star Strike

Reposition next to the target, then throw piercing kunai each dealing (AD) Physical Damage to the first enemy hit, reduced for subsequent targets. Kunai remove Armor, increased if they crit. N.O.V.A. Strike: Slice all enemies, applying Wound and a bleed that deals Physical Damage each second for the rest of combat.

Bel'Veth
2
Tidal Slashes

Unleash a flurry of slashes at the current target over several seconds, dealing (AD & AP) Physical Damage each.

Gnar
2
Slingshot Maneuver

Passive: Every 5th attack, launch a returning boomerang at the target that travels two hexes past the first enemy hit, dealing (AD & AP) Physical Damage reduced per hit. Meep Bonus: Meeps attack alongside Gnar dealing Physical Damage per second.

Gragas
2
Chemical Rage

Heal (Health & AP) over several seconds. Then deal (AP) Magic Damage to adjacent enemies and Chill them, reducing their Attack Speed by 30%.

Gwen
2
Dance n' Dice

Passive: Attacks deal magic damage. Gwen is in The Groove while targeting an enemy below % Health. Active: Dash to snip the lowest percent Health enemy dealing (AP) Magic Damage to the target and Magic Damage in a cone. If this kills, dash and snip again at reduced damage.

Jax
2
Counter Star-ike

Enter a defensive stance, reducing incoming damage and gaining (AP) Shield. When the stance ends, strike all nearby enemies dealing (Armor & MR) Magic Damage and Stunning them.

Jinx
2
Fishbones!

Fire a barrage of (AS) bullets in a cone, each dealing (AD) Physical Damage to the first target hit.

Meepsie
2
Meep Impact

Heal (Health & AP) over time. Slam the target dealing (AP) Magic Damage and knocking up. The impact creates meepwaves with % of these effects in the target's row. Meep Bonus: Meeps increase all incoming Healing and Shielding.

Milio
2
ULTRA MEGA TIME KICK

Kick a ball at an enemy dealing (AP) magic damage. On impact, the ball has a 100% chance to bounce to a new target dealing reduced magic damage. These bounces can trigger additional bounces, but the odds halve with each bounce.

Mordekaiser
2
Indestructible

Gain (AP) Shield. Each second for the duration, gain more Shield and deal (AP) Magic Damage to adjacent enemies. When this ability ends, consume the remaining Shield and heal for % of its value.

Pantheon
2
Advanced Defences

Gain (Health & AP) Shield and % Durability. Over the duration, deal (AD) Physical Damage each second to enemies in a cone.

Pyke
2
Marked for Death

Reposition to throw a harpoon at the furthest enemy, pulling the first enemy hit one hex forward and dealing (AP) physical damage. Then teleport behind them and cleave dealing (AD) Physical Damage to them and (AD) Physical Damage to nearby enemies.

Zoe
2
Paddle Star

Fire a paddle star at the current target dealing (AP) Magic Damage to the first target hit and reduced damage to others it passes through. When the missile reaches its destination, redirect it to a distant enemy, repeating the damage. This redirect can occur multiple times.

Aurora
3
Hopped-Up Hacks

Open a rift containing the target, Hacking enemies within and dealing Magic Damage plus split Magic Damage between all enemies hit. Hacked enemies store % of all damage taken. When the Hack ends, they take true damage equal to the stored damage.

Diana
3
Pale Cascade

Passive: Attacks deal (AP) bonus magic damage. Active: Gain (AP) Shield and summon 3 encircling orbs. Orbs deal Magic Damage to enemies they pass through and rotate faster based on Attack Speed.

Fizz
3
Meep Bait

Dash through the current target dealing (AP) magic damage. Every third cast also summons a Mega Meep that briefly knocks the target up and deals Magic Damage in a one-hex radius. Meep Bonus: Add Meeps to the bait, increasing Mega Meep damage.

Illaoi
3
Test of Spirit

Gain (AP) Shield. Over the duration, drain Health from the nearest enemies. Then slam down, dealing (AP) Magic Damage to all enemies within 2 hexes.

Kai'Sa
3
Bullet Cluster

Passive: On takedown, gain mana. Active: Fire missiles in a hex radius around the current target, dealing (AD) Physical Damage each.

Lulu
3
It's Raining Stars

Passive: Lulu's spell gains a different secondary effect each game. Active: Call down something from the sky dealing (AP) Magic Damage to nearby enemies with a special effect based on this game's Stargazer Constellation.

Maokai
3
Grasp of Convergence

Passive: Gain more max Health from all sources. Active: Converge vines on the target, dealing (AP) Magic Damage to each enemy hit and Stunning them. N.O.V.A. Strike: Send a wave of dragons that stun all enemies. For the rest of combat, Maokai's attacks deal (Health) bonus physical damage.

Miss Fortune
3
Gun Goddess Arsenal

Unleash a full arsenal of bullets at enemies, dealing physical damage.

Ornn
3
Disco Inferno

Passive: On combat start, forge a temporary completed item. If 3 items are already equipped, a random completed item becomes Radiant instead. Active: Gain (AP) Shield, then breathe fire in a cone dealing (AP) magic damage. After the Shield expires, Ornn enters The Groove.

Rhaast
3
Scythe

Gain % Durability, healing (AP) over the duration. Afterwards, slash forward in a line dealing (AD) Physical Damage to enemies hit and knocking them up.

Samira
3
Jump and Jive

Passive: Whenever an enemy is knocked up, shoot them dealing (AD & AP) Physical Damage and entering The Groove. Active: Unleash a volley of bullets at the target dealing (AD) Physical Damage and knocking up.

Urgot
3
Unstoppable Dreadnought

Passive - Proximity Blast: Whenever an enemy enters a hex radius, fire a blast in a cone dealing (AD) Physical Damage with falloff per hex. Each adjacent hex has its own cooldown. Active: Gain (AP) Shield and dash behind the current target. Reset Proximity Blast's cooldowns.

Viktor
3
Psionic Storm

Channel a psionic storm that follows enemies. Each second, it grows larger and deals (AP) Magic Damage to enemies within, reduced per hex from the epicenter.

Aurelion Sol
4
Deathbeam

Channel a deathbeam towards the current target for several seconds, dealing (AP) Magic Damage per second, reduced per enemy it passes through. Ignores % of the enemy's Magic Resist.

Corki
4
Asteroid Blaster

Strafe to a nearby position, unleashing missiles split between the target and all enemies within two hexes. Missiles deal (AD) Physical Damage with a % chance of firing a mega missile that deals increased damage. Meep Bonus: Every few seconds, launch an Explosive Meep at the target dealing (AD) Physical Damage in a one hex radius on impact.

Karma
4
Singularity

Gather the force of a black hole, dealing (AP) Magic Damage split between the target and the closest enemies to them. The target takes additional (AP) magic damage.

Kindred
4
Cosmic Pursuit

Passive: Attacks and Abilities mark the target. When an enemy reaches max marks, Wolf consumes them dealing (AD & AP) physical damage. Active: Jump away and fire arrows at the nearest targets, each dealing (AD) physical damage. N.O.V.A. Strike: Gain Damage Amp and add a mark to all enemies periodically.

LeBlanc
4
Fracture Reality

Passive: Attacks deal (AP) Magic Damage instead. Active: Summon clones that attack alongside LeBlanc for several attacks at % damage. For their final attack, clones fire a bolt dealing (AP) magic damage.

Master Yi
4
Psi Strikes

Passive: Every third attack strikes an additional time for (AD) bonus physical damage. Active: After brief meditation, enter a Psi-State gaining Omnivamp, Attack Speed, and increased movement speed. Twice a second, fire a psychic projection at a random nearby enemy dealing (AD & AP) physical damage.

Nami
4
Bubble Pop

Toss a disco bubble at the target dealing (AP) Magic Damage split between enemies in a one hex radius. The explosion sends globs towards nearby enemies dealing magic damage. On cast, Nami enters The Groove.

Nunu
4
Calamity

Gain (AP) Shield. Summon an astrolabe to crash down on the most enemies within 2 hexes dealing (AP) magic damage, then push the astrolabe towards the end of the board dealing additional (AP) magic damage. All enemies hit are knocked up.

Rammus
4
Gravitational Spin

Gain (AP) Shield. Then strike the most enemies in a three hex line dealing (AP & Armor) magic damage. Meep Bonus: Reduce damage of incoming attacks. After being attacked several times, deal (Armor) Magic Damage in a two hex radius.

Riven
4
Time Warp

Passive: Adapts to Riven's higher stat between AD and AP. Attacks deal bonus physical or Magic Damage accordingly. Active: Dash to a nearby hex, gaining Shield and slashing adjacent enemies. Every third cast, leap into the air and launch a wave of energy.

Tahm Kench
4
Tounge Lash

Passive: Once per combat after dropping below % Health, gain Shield equal to % of healing received this combat. Active: Heal (Health & AP), then tongue lash all enemies within two hexes dealing (AP & Health) magic damage.

The Mighty Mech
4
Gravity Matrix

Enter a defensive stance gaining % Durability. While in the defensive stance, attract nearby enemy projectiles and heal over the duration. When this ends, release a shockwave that deals (Armor & MR) Physical Damage in a hex range.

Xayah
4
Stellar Ricochet

Passive: Attacks bounce to strike multiple times, dealing reduced damage per target and leaving a Feather behind the final target. Active: Gain Attack Speed for a duration. At the end, recall all Feathers split between the closest enemies dealing (AD) Physical Damage each.

Bard
5
Ultra Friendly Object

Summon a flying saucer over the current target. Each second it deals (AP) Magic Damage to the target plus split Magic Damage to all enemies within range. Deals increased damage to Tanks. If an enemy under the UFO dies, Bard has a chance to abduct them and create a 1-star copy on your bench. Meep Bonus: Grant nearby Astronauts additional Meeps on combat start.

Blitzcrank
5
Party Crasher

Passive: Every few seconds, call down a bolt on the highest Health nearby enemy dealing (AP) magic damage. Active: Summon a disco ball at the largest clump of enemies, then uppercut the current target dealing Magic Damage and knocking them up. They crash into the disco ball dealing Magic Damage in a three hex radius. Enter The Groove for each enemy hit.

Fiora
5
Perfect Bladework

Passive: Every few attacks, reveal a Vital on the target. Attacking a Vital deals (AD) bonus true damage and heals for % of damage dealt. Active: Reveal multiple Vitals on the target and quickly attack them all. If the target dies, remaining Vitals transfer to the nearest enemy. Upon striking the final Vital, create a two hex aura that heals allies over time.

Graves
5
Collateral Damage

Passive: Attacks fire multiple projectiles in a cone dealing Physical Damage each. Active: Fire an explosive shell dealing (AD) Physical Damage to the target, and additional (AD & AP) Physical Damage to all enemies in a one hex radius.

Jhin
5
Space Opera

Passive: Fixed attack speed; converts bonus Attack Speed into bonus Attack Damage. Active: Summon spectral hands that fire alongside Jhin for several attacks, each dealing (AD) Physical Damage per shot and removing Armor. The final shots deal increased damage and pierce through the most enemies in a line.

Morgana
5
Dark Form

Transform into Dark Form gaining (AP) Shield. While in Dark Form, tether nearby enemies dealing (AP) Magic Damage per second to each and healing for % of damage dealt. At the end, deal (AP) Magic Damage to all tethered enemies.

Shen
5
Reality Tear

Passive: On cast, attacks gain stacking bonus magic damage. Starting from the third cast, deal true damage instead. Active: Gain (Health & AP) Shield, then slice open a rift on the largest group of champions dealing the Passive's bonus damage to all enemies within. Enemies have their Attack Speed slowed while allies within gain increased Attack Speed.

Sona
5
Psionic Crush

Hurl magnetic debris at the nearest target without one, dealing (AP) Magic Damage and sticking it to them. If an enemy with debris dies, it passes to the nearest enemy without one. Every few casts, rip off all debris dealing magic damage, then crush it onto the target dealing Magic Damage and briefly stunning them.

Vex
5
Lend Me a Hand, Shadow!

Passive: Every time Vex attacks, Shadow strikes a nearby enemy dealing (AP) magic damage. Whenever an enemy is struck enough times by Shadow, Shadow strikes them again. Active: Shadow launches empowered strikes dealing increased (AP) magic damage.

Zed
5
Quantum Clone

Create a clone behind the target with reduced max Health and increased Mana cost. The clone inherits its creator's items, stats, and current Health, and can cast Quantum Clone.

NEW TRAITS.

Anima

After losing a player combat, gain 15 Tech, plus additional Tech equal to 5 times the length of your loss streak. Additionally, gain 2 Tech per Anima takedown. Each time Animas get 100 Tech, they prototype new Anima Weapons. You can take them, or save your Tech to get more powerful weapons next time.

3
Start Researching!
6
Gain a loot Orb upon win
Arbiter

Scribe a unique divine law, allowing you to choose an effect to apply to Arbiters when a chosen cause occurs.

2
Choose a cause and effect for your law
3
Effects are stronger
Bulwark

Summon a placeable relic. At the start of combat, it grants adjacent allies a 18% max Health shield and 20% Attack Speed.

1
Summon a placeable relic that grants adjacent allies a 18% max Health shield and 20% Attack Speed at combat start

Commander

Sona gives you a random Command Mod every 2 rounds which allows you to alter the way an ally behaves during combat. Command Mods last 2 player combats even if they are not equipped.

1
Gain a random Command Mod every 2 rounds; Command Mods last 2 player combats
Dark Lady

Allies take 5% less damage from abilities, increased to 10% while Morgana is in Dark Form.

1
Allies take 5% less ability damage; increased to 10% while Morgana is in Dark Form
Dark Star

Dark Stars create a black hole that consumes enemies at low Health and gain bonus offensive stats.

2
Dark Stars create a black hole that consumes enemies at 10% max Health

4
AND they gain 30% AD & AP
6
AND the strongest Dark Star unit goes supermassive, gaining 100% effectiveness from Dark Star, and creates 2 minor Black Holes
9
All Dark Stars are supermassive. At level 10, CONSUME EVERYONE
Divine Duelist

You heal for 15% of player damage you deal. Fiora always wins a one on one duel.

1
Heal for 15% of player damage dealt; Fiora always wins one on one duels
Doomer

Combat Start: Mark all enemies with Doom. The first time enemies are damaged each combat, their Doom is consumed, stealing 8% Attack Damage and Ability Power from them and granting it to your strongest Vex.

1
Mark all enemies with Doom at combat start; the first damage consumed steals 8% AD and AP and grants it to your strongest Vex
Eradicator

Enemies have 14% less Armor and Magic Resist.

1
Enemies have 14% less Armor and Magic Resist

Factory New

After participating in combat, open an armory to purchase a permanent upgrade for your strongest Graves. Every 3 upgrades, future upgrades will take an additional round.

1
After combat, open an armory to buy a permanent upgrade for your strongest Graves; every 3 upgrades adds one round delay
Galaxy Hunter

Zed is obtained from the Invader Zed augment. While at least one clone is alive, Zed gains 40% bonus Attack Damage.

1
While at least one Zed clone is alive, Zed gains 40% bonus Attack Damage

Gun Goddess

When you field Miss Fortune, choose between Channeler Mode, Challenger Mode, and Replicator Mode. Miss Fortune has a unique ability based on her mode and gains the associated trait.

1
Choose Miss Fortune's mode (Channeler, Challenger, or Replicator); she gains a unique ability and the associated trait
Mecha

Innate: Mecha units can transform into their Ultimate form, upgrading their ability and gaining 60% Health. Transformed Mechas take up two team slots and count twice for the Mecha trait.

3
Energy Cells: Mechas gain 20% AD & AP
4
Overclocked Cells: Increased to 35% AD & AP
6
Precision Engineering: +1 max team size
Meeple

Astronauts attract Meeps that empower Astronaut abilities in meepy ways. They also gain bonus Health.

3
2% Meep power, 125 Health

5
3% Meep power, 250 Health

7
4% Meep power, 400 Health. Create a Cloning Slot on your bench. Gain gold and a 1-star copy of the champion placed there when cloning completes
10
6% Meep power, 1000 Health. SUMMON THE FOUR MEEPLORDS!
N.O.V.A.

6 seconds into combat, N.O.V.A. grant a power surge to allies based on champions. At 5, gain a Striker selector — the chosen N.O.V.A. activates their Strike during the power surge.

2
6 seconds into combat, N.O.V.A. grant a power surge to allies based on champions
5
Gain a Striker selector. The chosen N.O.V.A. activates their Strike during the power surge. (Aatrox: 30% Shred/Sunder, Caitlyn: 20% AS to allies, Akali: Precision, Maokai: 15% max Health heal, Kindred: 800 shield on strongest Tank, Emblem: 10% stacking bonus true damage)

Oracle

Every 3 rounds, Tahm Kench grants a reward!

1
Every 3 rounds, Tahm Kench grants a reward
Party Animal

Once per combat, after falling below 45% Health, become untargetable and repair 15% max Health per second. Upon reaching full Health, or when no other allies remain, return to combat. If fully healed, Blitzcrank enters The Groove and Party Crasher's passive fires bolts four times as fast.

1
Below 45% Health, become untargetable and repair 15% max Health/sec; if fully healed, enter The Groove and fire bolts 4x as fast
Primordian

Dealing damage spawns Swarmlings based on Primordian star level. 8% of damage taken contributes to damage dealt.

2
Dealing damage spawns Swarmlings based on Primordian star level
3
Spawn even more Swarmlings! Each round, gain a random 1 or 2-cost champion
Psionic

Gain Psionic items that can be equipped to any ally.

2
Gain the first Psionic item
4
Gain the second Psionic item; Psionic items gain extra effects on Psionic units
Redeemer

For each non-unique trait you have active, your team gains 2%/3%/4% Attack Speed, and 2/3/4 Armor and Magic Resist.

1
Per non-unique active trait: 2%/3%/4% Attack Speed and 2/3/4 Armor & MR (scales with Rhaast's star level)

Shepherd

Shepherds summon the Bond of the Stars to aid them in battle. Bia and Bayin's power are increased by the total star level of Shepherd.

3
Summon Bia
5
Summon Bayin
7
Bia and Bayin's bond grows deeper
Space Groove

Groovians can enter the Groove. While in it, they gain Attack Speed and max Health Regen, increased per Groovian on your team.

1
Groovians can enter the Groove, gaining Attack Speed and max Health Regen

3
All Groovians start combat in the Groove for 3 seconds
5
Each second spent in the Groove grants 3% stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power

7
Increase these effects by 20%
10
the Groove
Stargazer

Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. Allies in empowered hexes gain bonuses based on the active constellation. Stargazers in empowered hexes gain additional effects. More hexes reveal at each player level.

3
First constellation tier bonuses active
5
Second constellation tier bonuses active
7
Third constellation tier bonuses active
Timebreaker

When you lose, gain free rerolls. When you win, store XP in a Temporal Core (scales with stage).

2
When you lose, gain free rerolls. When you win, store XP in a Temporal Core
3
AND Allies gain 15% Attack Speed

4
AND Timebreakers gain an additional 50% Attack Speed

Bastion

Your team gains 12 Armor and Magic Resist. Bastions gain more, and the value doubles in the first 10 seconds of combat.

4

6

Brawler

Your team gains 7% Health. Brawlers gain more.

+45% maximum Health

Challenger

Your team gains 10% Attack Speed. Challengers gain bonus Attack Speed. When their target dies, Challengers dash to a new target and increase their Attack Speed bonus by 50% for 2.5 seconds.

Channeler

4

Marauder

2
5% Omnivamp, 20% AD
4
7% Omnivamp, 30% AD

Replicator

Replicator abilities occur a second time at reduced effectiveness.

2
25% strength on repeat
4
50% strength on repeat
Rogue

Rogues gain Attack Damage and Ability Power. The first time they fall below 50% health, they slip into shadows. Enemies targeting them are redirected to a nearby unit, preferring Tanks.

2
15% AD & AP
3
30% AD & AP
4
45% AD & AP

Sniper

Snipers gain Damage Amp, increased against targets farther away.

18% DA; +2% DA per hex

Vanguard

Vanguards gain 5% Durability while Shielded. Combat start and 50% Health: Gain a max Health Shield for 10 seconds.

NEW AUGMENTS.

There are about 40 new Augments in Space Gods, including 8 Hero Augments that give champions an alternate Ability to play around. One Hero Augment grants you access to Zed, a unique infinite-cloning 5-cost champion!

Aatrox Hero
Aatrox's spell is now a low-mana three-hit combo that heals him for a portion of the damage dealt. When his NOVA move happens, he gains maximum health and size.
Bonk!
Gain a Nasus. Your strongest Nasus becomes an Attack Fighter with a single target ability that gets stronger with each kill.
Charge Transfer I
Your team gains 5% Damage Amp. 50% of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy.
Cognitive Tax
Gain 8 gold and 1 XP.
Cognitive Tax+
Gain 12 gold and 3 XP.
Expedition
At the start of planning phase, lose the right-most champion on your bench. After losing 33 gold of units this way, gain a powerful reward.
Feeling Lucky
Gain 12 gold, then flip a coin. If heads, gain 3 more gold.
Forge a Friend
The next 1-cost champion you purchase is 3-star.
Group Hug I
Combat start: Allies grant other adjacent allies 6 Armor and Magic Resist. This effect stacks.
Kick Start
Gain a random 2-star 2-cost champion and 1 gold.
Poppy Hero
Gain a Poppy. Poppy becomes a ranged Marksman and her attacks Meeps at her target.
Size Matters
Gain a Giant's Belt. After a champion begins combat with more than 3800 max Health, gain another.
The Tower
Gain a massive Training Dummy that zaps nearby enemies.
Anima Commander
Gain a Briar, a Jinx, and an Illaoi. Increase your current and max player Health by 10.
Backline Blueprint
Gain a 3-cost non-Tank champion and an emblem for their last-listed trait.
Booster Pack
Gain 11 gold worth of random champions. (At least one 3-Cost guaranteed!)
Booster Pack+
Gain 18 gold worth of random champions. (At least one 4-Cost guaranteed!)
Booster Pack++
Gain 30 gold worth of random champions. (At least one 5-Cost guaranteed!)
Charge Transfer II
Your team gains 8% Damage Amp. 80% of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy.
Cognitive Overload
Gain 7 Gold, 1 2-star 1-cost champion, 1 2-cost champion, 2 3-cost champions, 1 XP, and 1 Shop reroll.
Contract Killer
Gain a Pyke. Your strongest Pyke gains a resetting ability and generates gold on takedown.
Cosmic Restart
Call upon the Gods to sell all units on your board and bench. Gain 2 random Emblems and 10 free Shop rerolls.
Frontline Foundation
Gain a 2-star 1-cost Tank champion and an emblem for their last-listed trait.
Group Hug II
Combat start: Allies grant other adjacent allies 9 Armor and Magic Resist. This effect stacks.
Invader Zed
Gain a Bloodthirster. On Stage 4-1, gain a Zed. After receiving Zed, he can then appear in your shops. Zed is a 5-cost Attack Fighter that creates clones of himself.
Kahunahuna
Every 5th attack deals bonus true damage equal to 200% Basic Attack Damage.
Lifting Competition
TBD
May the Fours Be With You
Your 4 cost champions and Jhin gain 204 Health and 14% Attack Speed. Gain a Jhin.
Meep Space 9
Meepsie gains a weaker version of Brock's spell and heavy attack damage.
Misfits
Your team gains 75 Health for each active Unique trait. Gain a Miss Fortune and a Rhaast.
Money Hungry
Gain 10 gold now, then 7 gold at the start of every stage. Picking up gold makes your Tactician larger.
Reach For the Stars
Jax gains stacking attack speed with every attack. On cast, jump to a nearby enemy, dealing damage and adding stacking on-hit damage for the rest of combat.
Self Destruct
Gain a Gragas. Gragas now self detonates, sacrificing 20% of max Health to deal XXX (AP) plus the sacrificed Health as magic damage in a four hex radius, reduced by 20% per hex from the epicenter.
Side Effects
When an ally is healed, they deal 50% of the healing to their target as magic damage. Every 5 seconds, allies heal for 5% of their max Health.
Sniper's Nest
Snipers gain 8% Damage Amp for each combat fought from the same starting hex, up to 32%. Gain an Ezreal and a Gnar.
Star Conqueror
Mordekaiser becomes an auto-attack based AP carry, whose channel is a burst of attack speed for as long as he has mana to spend. At combat start and on kill, he gains a non-mana-locking shield.
Baron's Lair
Gain a Tank item. After 8 seconds of combat, your team gains 5% Attack Damage and Ability Power every second for the rest of combat.
Five-Pointed Star
At the start of each stage, the first champion you buy from a specific tier is 2-star. Gain a 2-star 1-cost champion and 2 gold now. Stage 2: 2-cost, Stage 3: 3-cost, Stage 4: 4-cost, Stage 5: 5-cost.
Golden Gamble
Flip a coin. If heads, gain a Radiant Lucky Item Chest. If tails, gain a random Radiant item and a Reforger.
Just Hit
Gain a Champion Duplicator, 18 Shop rerolls, and 10 gold.
